content.text:
Crafting Basics

Crafting is how you create tools, weapons, and other useful items in Minecraft. The crafting table is your most important tool.

Making a Crafting Table:

  • Open your inventory (press E)
  • Turn wood logs into planks (right-click wood in the 2x2 grid)
  • Place 4 planks in the 2x2 grid to make a crafting table
  • Place the crafting table in the world

Using the Crafting Table:

  • Right-click the crafting table to open the 3x3 crafting grid
  • The larger grid allows more complex recipes
  • Many items can only be crafted on a crafting table

Essential First Crafts:

  • Sticks - Used for tools and weapons
  • Wooden Pickaxe - For mining stone
  • Wooden Sword - For protection
  • Torches - For lighting areas
content.task: Gather wood, make a crafting table, and craft a wooden pickaxe and wooden sword.
